case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. HENRY KACHELLE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CITY AND COUNTY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTIONS SERVICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT HENRY KACHELLE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENRY, KACHELLE $4,585.59 PRINCIPAL, $41.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,626.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
